'''wazate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:sacrad|sacrad]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-z-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sacrad|sacrad]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| wazate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:wazate|wazate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wazatesher|wazatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wazatesherĂ«m|wazatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wazatero|wazatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wazateshĂ«|wazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wazateshĂ«m|wazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwazatero|gokiwazatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwazateshĂ«|gokiwazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwazateshĂ«m|gokiwazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowazankerom|gowazankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowazankeshĂ«|gowazankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowazankeshĂ«m|gowazankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowazankeya|gowazankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wazaterom|wazaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wazatemu|wazatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wazateya|wazateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwazaterom|gokiwazaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwazatemu|gokiwazatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwazateya|gokiwazateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:wazazate|wazazate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wazazatesher|wazazatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wazazatesherĂ«m|wazazatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wazazatero|wazazatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wazazateshĂ«|wazazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wazazateshĂ«m|wazazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwazazatero|gokiwazazatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwazazateshĂ«|gokiwazazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwazazateshĂ«m|gokiwazazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowazazankerom|gowazazankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowazazankeshĂ«|gowazazankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowazazankeshĂ«m|gowazazankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowazazankeya|gowazazankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wazazaterom|wazazaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wazazatemu|wazazatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wazazateya|wazazateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwazazaterom|gokiwazazaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwazazatemu|gokiwazazatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwazazateya|gokiwazazateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:wĂŠzĂŠte|wĂŠzĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wĂŠzĂŠtesher|wĂŠzĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠzĂŠtesherĂ«m|wĂŠzĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wĂŠzĂŠtero|wĂŠzĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«|wĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m|wĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠzĂŠtero|gokiwĂŠzĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«|gokiwĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m|gokiwĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowĂŠzĂŠnkerom|gowĂŠzĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«|gowĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gowĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowĂŠzĂŠnkeya|gowĂŠzĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wĂŠzĂŠterom|wĂŠzĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠzĂŠtemu|wĂŠzĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wĂŠzĂŠteya|wĂŠzĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠzĂŠterom|gokiwĂŠzĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠzĂŠtemu|gokiwĂŠzĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠzĂŠteya|gokiwĂŠzĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:wafzafte|wafzafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wafzaftesher|wafzaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafzaftesherĂ«m|wafzaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wafzaftero|wafzaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wafzafteshĂ«|wafzafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafzafteshĂ«m|wafzafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwafzaftero|gokiwafzaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwafzafteshĂ«|gokiwafzafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafzafteshĂ«m|gokiwafzafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowafzafnkerom|gowafzafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowafzafnkeshĂ«|gowafzafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowafzafnkeshĂ«m|gowafzafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowafzafnkeya|gowafzafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wafzafterom|wafzafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafzaftemu|wafzaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wafzafteya|wafzafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwafzafterom|gokiwafzafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafzaftemu|gokiwafzaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwafzafteya|gokiwafzafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
